changes.text: Onboarding wizard — 4-step guide shown on first visit
'Don't show again' option persisted in localStorage
'How to' button in TopBar to reopen the guide anytime
Recipe category + subcategory scraped from output item page (Weapon, Armor, Accessory, Other)
Category badge on RecipeCard (⚔ Weapon, 🛡 Armor, 💍 Accessory, 📦 Other)
Changelog modal with version badge in TopBar
Adena coin SVG icon replacing ₳ symbol across all components
Success rate badge hidden for material recipes (always 100%)
Abbreviated 'materials' to 'mats' in RecipeCard to keep pills on one row
Categories populated for all 17 recipes in the database
Recipe browser — search and browse all scraped recipes
My Crafts — per-recipe BOM with shared inventory depletion
Recursive BOM engine expanding sub-recipes up to 4 levels deep
Adena cost tracking — total cost, invested value, still to buy
Completion progress bar per recipe
Market Prices — global material price catalog
Inventory management with quantity tracking
Export / Import state as JSON
Wiki scraper + BFS discovery agent for full recipe chains
Bow of Peril full chain (9 recipes)
Sword of Damascus full chain (6 recipes)
Demon's Dagger 60% and 100% (2 recipes)
